text_block_list.text:
With her debut mere moments away, Oguri Cap's
time has finally arrived.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Here we are. I actually feel... oddly calm.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's all thanks to you, no doubt.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. You look out for me, just like everybody
back home. That's why I feel so relaxed.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I wanna repay everyone for supporting me. It's
because of them that I'm able to stand here
today.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...It's time to run. This is where it all begins.
